name: flatnotes
description: A self-hosted, database-less markdown note-taking app
compose:
name: slashnode-flatnotes
services:
  server:
    image: dullage/flatnotes:v5.5.4
    container_name: flatnotes
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
      FLATNOTES_AUTH_TYPE: password
      FLATNOTES_USERNAME: admin
      FLATNOTES_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      FLATNOTES_SECRET_KEY: ${secret.APP_SEED}
    volumes:
      - server_data:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8523:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-flatnotes_server_data
